name: flaim-fantasy
description: Read-only fantasy sports analysis across ESPN, Yahoo, and Sleeper. Get roster advice, standings, matchups, waiver wire picks, and start/sit decisions.

interface.shortDescription: Read-only fantasy analysis for ESPN, Yahoo, and Sleeper.
interface.longDescription: Use Flaim's fantasy-analysis skills and MCP server to review rosters, matchups, standings, transactions, and waiver options across your real leagues without making account changes.
defaultPrompt: Review my fantasy roster and suggest my best starters.
Analyze my matchup and flag my biggest strengths and risks.
Find the best waiver targets in my league right now.
